meaning: adv.昂贵地,仔细地,过分讲究地
examples: Do you have been dismissed or fired preciously?
That regard must the fixed ratio gift come preciously.
The electronic counter can preciously control the carton quantity.
Maybe it is because the men have preciously tucked away under their arms their fresh bundles of qaat, the stimulant that some of them have already started to chew.
This guy has exploded the dull forms that have crowded our cities and had induced us to accept lazy, boring or preciously minimalist constructions in the name of art and economics.
